description: Maps every major task and capability to its authoritative documentation source. Use this as the entry point for RAG and retrieval systems.

entries.task: Initialize Push Chain SDK client
entries.notes: Always start here. Returns PushChainClient with .universal, .orchestrator, .explorer namespaces.

entries.task: Convert EVM signer (ethers/viem) to UniversalSigner
entries.notes: PushChain.utils.signer.toUniversal(signer). Works with ethers v5, v6, and viem WalletClient.

entries.task: Convert Solana keypair to UniversalSigner
entries.notes: PushChain.utils.signer.toUniversalFromKeypair(keypair, { chain, library }). Must specify SOLANA_WEB3JS library.

entries.task: Send a transaction on Push Chain (Route 1)
entries.notes: Route 1: tx.to is a plain string address. Executes on Push Chain via UEA.

entries.task: Send a transaction to an external chain (Route 2)
entries.notes: Route 2: tx.to is { address, chain }. Executes on external chain via CEA. Route 3: tx.to is plain + tx.from.chain set.

entries.task: Smart contract initiates cross-chain execution
entries.notes: Pure Solidity — no SDK required. Call IUniversalGatewayPC(0x00000000000000000000000000000000000000C1).sendUniversalTxOutbound() to dispatch. Contract's CEA (derived from contract address) is msg.sender on external chain. Implement executeUniversalTx() for optional inbound callback. Always validate msg.sender == UNIVERSAL_EXECUTOR_MODULE (0x14191Ea54B4c176fCf86f51b0FAc7CB1E71Df7d7) and replay-protect with txId.

entries.task: Track transaction status and confirmations
entries.notes: Use tx.wait() for synchronous wait, progressHook for real-time events, trackTransaction() for polling by hash.

entries.task: Sign a message universally
entries.notes: pushChainClient.universal.signMessage(data). Signs from any chain wallet.

entries.task: Read blockchain state without signing
entries.notes: No SDK needed for reads. Use ethers.JsonRpcProvider or viem.createPublicClient pointed at https://evm.donut.rpc.push.org/ (Chain ID 42101). Push Chain is 100% EVM-compatible — same API as Ethereum.

entries.task: Connect wallet in a React application
entries.notes: Use PushUniversalAccountButton and PushUniversalWalletProvider from @pushchain/ui-kit.

entries.task: Set up wallet provider context in React
entries.notes: PushUniversalWalletProvider wraps the app. usePushChainClient() hook returns initialized client.

entries.task: Initialize EVM client for Push Chain
entries.notes: Create ethers or viem client connected to Push Chain RPC. Use for direct contract reads or custom interactions.

entries.task: Look up PushChain.CONSTANTS values
entries.notes: agents/constants.json is the canonical lookup for all CHAIN, PUSH_NETWORK, LIBRARY, and MOVEABLE.TOKEN values.

entries.task: Use utility functions (parse units, format units, account helpers)
entries.notes: PushChain.utils.helpers.* and PushChain.utils.account.*. See agents/examples/index.json for 20+ utility examples.

entries.task: Use contract helper utilities
entries.notes: IUEAFactory at 0x00000000000000000000000000000000000000eA. getOriginForUEA(addr) → (UniversalAccountId, bool isUEA): identify if msg.sender is a UEA and get origin chain/wallet. getUEAForOrigin(UniversalAccountId) → (address uea, bool isDeployed): derive UEA address for any external wallet.

entries.task: Check UEA deployment status and upgrade requirements
entries.notes: Check before sending if UEA may need upgrade. Returns { uea: { deployed, requiresUpgrade, version } }.

entries.task: Upgrade Universal Executor Account
entries.notes: Gasless operation. Call pushChainClient.upgradeAccount() when getAccountStatus shows requiresUpgrade: true.

entries.task: Reinitialize client with different signer
entries.notes: Used when wallet switches or session resets. status: inferred.

entries.task: Build a custom signer for unsupported wallets
entries.notes: PushChain.utils.signer.construct(account, { signAndSendTransaction, signMessage, signTypedData }) returns UniversalSignerSkeleton. Pass skeleton to toUniversal() to get final UniversalSigner. All signing functions return Uint8Array.

entries.task: Access wallet context in React hooks
entries.notes: usePushWalletContext() hook from @pushchain/ui-kit.

entries.task: Access initialized PushChainClient via React hook
entries.notes: usePushChainClient() hook returns the initialized pushChainClient instance from PushUniversalWalletProvider.

entries.task: Understand UEA (Universal Executor Account)
entries.notes: Smart contract account on Push Chain derived deterministically from (chainNamespace, chainId, walletAddress). Lazy-deployed on first use. When external user calls a Push Chain contract, msg.sender = UEA address. Use IUEAFactory.getOriginForUEA(msg.sender) to recover origin. push-contracts/SKILL.md has the full flow diagram and two-direction comparison table.

entries.task: Understand UOA (Universal Origin Account)
entries.notes: The user's source chain wallet (Ethereum EOA, Solana pubkey). The controller that authorizes execution.

entries.task: Understand CEA (Chain Executor Account)
entries.notes: Executor account on external chains representing UEA. Used in Route 2 and Route 3.

entries.task: Understand fee abstraction
entries.notes: Users pay gas in native tokens (ETH, SOL). No PC token acquisition required. SEND-TX-05-* progress events handle funding.

entries.task: Understand wallet abstraction
entries.notes: Any supported wallet becomes a UniversalSigner. SDK derives UEA deterministically.

entries.task: Find supported chains and CAIP-2 identifiers
entries.notes: CAIP-2 format: eip155:<chainId> for EVM, solana:<network> for Solana. Use PushChain.CONSTANTS.CHAIN.* for SDK values.

entries.task: Deploy a smart contract to Push Chain
entries.notes: Push Chain is 100% EVM-compatible. Foundry: forge create --rpc-url https://evm.donut.rpc.push.org/ --private-key $PRIVATE_KEY src/Contract.sol:Contract. Hardhat: npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.ts --network pushDonut (chainId: 42101). Explorer: https://donut.push.network.

entries.task: External chain smart contract calling Push Chain via Universal Gateway
entries.notes: Solidity on external chain calls IUniversalGateway.sendUniversalTx(bytes recipient, bytes payload, address token, uint256 amount) payable. UG addresses: Ethereum Sepolia 0x05bD7a3D18324c1F7e216f7fBF2b15985aE5281A, Arbitrum Sepolia 0x2cd870e0166Ba458dEC615168Fd659AacD795f34, Base Sepolia 0xFD4fef1F43aFEc8b5bcdEEc47f35a1431479aC16, BNB Testnet 0x44aFFC61983F4348DdddB886349eb992C061EaC0. On Push Chain, msg.sender = caller contract's UEA.

entries.task: Identify cross-chain caller origin in a Push Chain Solidity contract
entries.notes: IUEAFactory(0x00000000000000000000000000000000000000eA).getOriginForUEA(msg.sender) returns (UniversalAccountId { chainNamespace, chainId, owner }, bool isUEA). isUEA=false means native Push Chain EOA. owner is always hex bytes — bs58-decode for Solana addresses.

entries.task: Handle SDK errors and recover from failures
entries.notes: Error codes follow SEND-TX-{stage}-{code} pattern. See agents/errors.json for full catalog.

entries.task: Prepare and execute a multi-hop transaction cascade with a single signature
entries.notes: prepareTransaction() each hop individually, then executeTransactions([...prepared]) for atomic single-signature submission. All per-hop args (to, data, value, funds, gasLimit, payGasWith, deadline, from, progressHook) are supported per hop. Use when multiple chains must be visited in one user gesture.

entries.task: Sign EIP-712 typed structured data (Permit2, Seaport, Uniswap v3/v4, gasless approvals)
entries.notes: pushChainClient.universal.signTypedData({ domain, types, value }). Returns Uint8Array. Required for off-chain typed-data authorizations — gasless approvals, order matching, permit signatures.

entries.task: Derive UEA or CEA address off-chain before transacting
entries.notes: PushChain.utils.account.deriveExecutorAccount(uoa, { chain, skipNetworkCheck? }) → { address }. No on-chain call required. Use for gas-estimation pre-flight, balance checks before transacting, and whitelisting the CEA on target contracts.

entries.task: Resolve the controlling origin wallet behind a UEA or CEA address
entries.notes: PushChain.utils.account.resolveControllerAccount(address, { chain?, skipNetworkCheck? }). Reverse of deriveExecutorAccount — UEA → UOA or CEA → Push → UOA. Returns accounts[] with type ('uea'|'uoa'|'cea') and role ('controller' on the root UOA). Pass options.chain for CEA inputs.

entries.task: Full documentation context for RAG
entries.notes: llms-full.txt contains complete documentation dump. llms.txt contains high-level summary with file references.
